User simulators can induce transfer learning, where a model trained on synthetic data generalizes better to real-world inputs. This transfer occurs because the synthetic environment reflects the underlying distribution, not just individual examples. This insight bridges AI alignment and machine learning, suggesting synthetic data should reflect the domain distribution for better generalization. Here is what I did next: I analyzed which ones got read.
